title: desmazeria marina subsp. pauciflora
intro: Desmazeria marina subsp. pauciflora, also known as Sea Grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Desmazeria marina subsp. pauciflora can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
